params.name: ids
params.description: Comma-separated album IDs

params.name: contrast
params.description:
Comma-separated list of streaming providers to contrast against.
Appends a `_contrast` field to the response with cross-platform matching data.
Available providers: `ytmusic`, `applemusic`, `amazonmusic`, `tencentmusic`, `pandora`, `gaana`.

params.name: contrast

Appends a `_contrast` field to the response with cross-platform matching data.
Available providers: `ytmusic`, `applemusic`, `amazonmusic`, `tencentmusic`, `pandora`, `gaana`.

params.description: Comma-separated artist IDs (2–10).

params.name: ids
params.description: Comma-separated album IDs (max 25).

params.name: ids
params.description: Comma-separated artist IDs (max 25).

params.name: ids
params.description: Comma-separated track IDs (max 25).

params.name: query
params.description: City, venue, or place name.

params.name: geoHash
params.description: Spotify geohash (from `/partner/concert-locations`).

params.name: geonameId
params.description: Geoname ID (from `/partner/concert-locations`).

params.name: from
params.description: Start of date range (YYYY-MM-DD).

params.name: to
params.description: End of date range (YYYY-MM-DD).

params.name: conceptUris
params.description: Comma-separated Spotify concept URIs (e.g. `spotify:concept:rock,spotify:concept:pop`).

params.name: paginationKey
params.description: Pass back the `paginationKey` from a prior response.

params.name: details
params.description: Enrich each concert with full concert details in parallel.

params.name: detailsLimit
params.description: Max concerts to enrich per request (max 50).

params.name: parsed
params.description: Return a flat, normalized concert shape instead of raw GraphQL.

params.name: id
params.description: Concert ID, `spotify:concert:URI`, or `open.spotify.com/concert/<id>` URL.

params.name: parsed
params.description: Return a flat, normalized concert shape instead of raw GraphQL.

params.name: authenticated
params.description: Set `false` to query as anonymous user (omits `me.profile` block).

params.name: id
params.description: Artist ID, URI, or open.spotify.com URL.

params.name: geoHash
params.description: Geohash for nearby-concert prioritization. `0` = global.

params.name: details
params.description: Enrich each concert with full concert details in parallel.

params.name: detailsLimit
params.description: Max concerts to enrich per request (max 50).

params.name: parsed
params.description: Return a flat, normalized concert shape instead of raw GraphQL.

params.name: query
params.description: Artist name to search.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of artist matches to return concerts for.

params.name: details
params.description: Enrich each concert with full concert details in parallel.

params.name: detailsLimit
params.description: Max concerts to enrich per request (max 50).

params.name: parsed
params.description: Return a flat, normalized concert shape instead of raw GraphQL.

params.name: id
params.description: 22-character Spotify playlist ID

params.name: type
params.description: Search type: multi, tracks, albums, artists, playlists, etc.
